_meta.source: 封神演义 canon mentions (OPEN_QUESTIONS_LOCKED Demo scope — 4 locked places)
_meta.note: These 4 places are UNDER-described in canon: most dimensions read as MISSING. present/missing flags are defensible from canon. This file is the golden expected-output C7's engine must reproduce. It describes ABSENCE only (H0) — no generated content, no source_type, no confidence.
_meta.ranking_note: 蓬萊 ranks #1 despite the lowest mention_count because it is missing ALL 5 dimensions (the two optional dims add weight); a place missing everything is a larger gap than one missing 4-of-5. This is the documented, deterministic behaviour of rank_score (see docs/gap_model.md). Scores are pinned in test_gap_model.py.

gaps.rationale: 闡教 HQ on 昆仑. Canon names its master (元始天尊) and disciples → inhabitants present. But near-zero architecture/layout (geography), no founding/era account (history), no depiction of daily life/customs (culture), and no catalogued landmarks/relics (features). Most-referenced demo place (55 mentions) → highest salience.

截教 HQ (rival faction). Canon names 通天教主 and the 截教 disciples → inhabitants present. The island/palace is very sparsely described: no geography of 金鰲島, no founding history of 碧遊宮, no cultural/daily-life depiction, no notable features catalogued. mention_count 45 = 碧遊宮 (38) + 金鰲島 (7) combined per the locked place entry.

Nezha's birthplace, a frontier pass (关隘). Canon gives its commander 李靖 and family + the Nezha events → inhabitants and a thread of history (the birth/turmoil events) present. But no terrain/layout of the pass (geography), no depiction of frontier-pass customs/daily life (culture — the rich angle the demo wants to fill), and no catalogued landmarks (features).

Legendary immortal isle, invoked by name only. Canon supplies no geography, no history, no culture, no catalogued features, and names no specific resident faction tied to it → ALL FIVE dimensions missing. Lowest mention_count (28) of the four.
